Coached by [[Tony Currie (rugby league)|Tony Currie]], the Broncos competed in [[Super League III]] and finished in 7th place. ==1998 Challenge Cup== The [[London Broncos]] progressed to the semi-finals of the Cup, before losing to the [[Wigan Warriors]] by 38–8 in a one-sided game at the [[Alfred McAlpine Stadium]], [[Huddersfield]].{{cite web|title=Rugby League Challenge Cup|url=http://www.rugby-league-world.com/1998/Results/ChallengeCup/Cup.html|website=Rugby League World|access-date=15 August
